stemHtml: When planning a take-off from Porto (LPPR) at a take-off mass of 89 tonnes, the EFB performance software gives a Flex temperature of 36° and a range of possible decision speeds with V1 MAX at 155 kts and V1 MIN at 142 kts. Complete the following sentence: Using a V1 of 155 kts, the climb performance (1) _____; and using a V1 of 142 kts, the stopping performance is (2) _____.
